name: Chocolate Cruncy Clusters
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Chow mein noodles (or 2 cups pretzel sticks, broken in half inches)
1 cup Dry roasted peanuts (or whole roasted almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate and sweetened condensed milk together.
2. Remove from heat and stir into the combined noodles and nuts.
3. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto wax paper-lined baking sheets.
4. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
5. Store loosely covered in a cool, dry place.
